title: jasminum pericallianthum
intro: Jasminum pericallianthum, also known as the Yellow Jasmine or Night-blooming Jasmine, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Oleaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antispasmodic. The health benefits of Jasminum pericallianthum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, due to its sedative properties, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and promote a healthy cardiovascular system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
